description.value:
Trigger A person attempts to open the coop, searches the mounds within, or causes damage to it

Effect A sudden blast of shadowy pigeons emerges from the coop, shrieking and flapping into the face of the triggering creature anywhere they might be in the room. That creature must attempt a @Check[will|dc:27|options:inflicts:frightened] save with the following results.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected and temporarily immune to these haunts for 24 hours.

Success The creature becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Frightened]{Frightened 1}, and this frightened condition can't be reduced below 1 as long as they remain in area B2a.

Failure The creature becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Frightened]{Frightened 2} and convinced that the pigeons are harbingers of a greater doom awaiting them. They cannot reduce their frightened condition below 1 for 24 hours.

Critical Failure As failure, but with an unlimited duration.

details.description: A sudden flurry of shadowy pigeons erupts into a frenzy and breaks out of the coop.
details.disable: @Check[nature|dc:25] to recognize the unquiet animal spirits and soothe them, allowing the spirits to disperse

publication.title: Pathfinder Adventure Path: Bastion of Blasphemies

details.reset: The haunted coop resets [[/gmr 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4 rounds} after it's triggered.
